ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration option */,
  "used_in" TEXT /* Module or component where the configuration is used */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum valid value for numeric configuration options */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum valid value for numeric configuration options */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration is required */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_used_in FOREIGN KEY ("used_in") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "is_numeric" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the type can be a numeric value */,
  "is_enum" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the type is an enumeration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module or component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module or component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the module is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the module */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the module */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derivative_generators" (
  "derivative_generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derivative generator */,
  "generator_name" TEXT /* Name of the derivative generator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the derivative generator */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the generator is a custom implementation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the generator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the generator was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the generator */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the generator was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derivative_generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "augmented_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the option is the default setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the option */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the option was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the option */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the option was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gather_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic configuration */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic configuration */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the statistic is the default setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the statistic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the statistic */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the mode is the default setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the mode */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mode was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the mode */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the mode was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_configurations" (
  "project_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project configuration link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration is currently active for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the project configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency link */,
  "dependent_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent configuration option */,
  "dependency_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option it depends on */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dependency */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the dependency */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependency_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "date_logged" TEXT /* Date when the error was logged */,
  "stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace of the error */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who logged the error */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)
